items.title: Russia is providing Iran intelligence to target U.S. forces, officials say
items.description: The targeting information has included the locations of American warships and aircraft in the Middle East, the officials said.

items.title: Justice Department targets Cuban officials, aims for indictments
items.description: The Justice Department has formed a working group to examine bringing federal charges against officials or entities within Cuba’s government.
